+
+99. **[DONE 2026-06-08 via manual automation hygiene] Bound plan-revision gate context.**
+   The ISSUE-342 automation failure exposed that `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`
+   fed the entire prior executor plan-gate review back into Codex when
+   `GATE_VERDICT: needs_changes` triggered a revision. Verbose gate output can
+   exceed Codex's 1,048,576-character input ceiling before execution starts.
+   The loop now caps only the prior gate-review prose to the last 20,000
+   characters with an explicit truncation notice before injecting it into the
+   next planner prompt. The task goal, TASK packet, gate verdict semantics,
+   same-phase retry behavior, execution, control review, queue publish modes,
+   scheduler config, and sandbox routing are unchanged.

 ### 10.2 Claude — plan gate (permission mode: `plan`)

@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
 # RGE Handoff Document
 
+> **Snapshot**: 2026-06-08 (plan-revision gate-context cap): automation hygiene after ISSUE-342 exposed a pre-execution failure path. `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1` now caps only the prior executor plan-gate review prose to the last 20,000 characters before feeding it into a Codex plan revision, with an explicit truncation notice. This prevents verbose `needs_changes` gate output from making the next revision prompt exceed Codex's 1,048,576-character input ceiling. The task goal, TASK packet, gate verdict semantics, same-phase retry behavior, execution, control review, queue publish modes, scheduler config, and sandbox routing are unchanged. Focused Pester coverage pins the cap helper and `Invoke-PlanFill` call site. Next automation step after this lands: arm the next bounded feature task and retry guarded PR-mode automation.
+
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-08 (ISSUE-342 command-palette fuzzy matching salvage): task 98 is implemented after the guarded/full-automation route failed in the Codex plan-gate revision path before execution. The `editor-egui-host` command-palette filter now adds deterministic ordered-subsequence fuzzy matching over label, shortcut display, and command diagnostic id, while preserving exact word/field, prefix, and substring ranking ahead of fuzzy-only matches. The score key uses match class, fuzzy compactness, field priority, label length, and original menu order. Tests now cover label/shortcut/diagnostic-id fuzzy matches, exact/prefix/substring outranking fuzzy-only matches, fuzzy compactness ordering, and no-match behavior. The cohesive host-menu test module now carries a file-local split-exemption annotation because the added palette coverage takes it past the 1000-line architecture-lint threshold. No plugin runtime/discovery, `editor-shell` routing, `editor-ui` menu registry, keybinding editor, Cargo, workflow, scheduler, architecture-lint rule/config, or dispatch automation behavior changed.
 
 > **Snapshot**: 2026-06-08 (ISSUE-340 Codex external-scratch routing): task 97 is complete as automation-substrate hygiene only. The dispatch loop now accepts `-CodexExecutorExternalScratch`; Queue, Auto, Guard, and Scheduler pass it through only when an operator supplies it. The default Codex execution sandbox remains `workspace-write`; the opt-in switch changes only Codex execution to `danger-full-access`, and it fails fast for `-Executor claude`. Planner/reviewer/correction sandboxes, publish behavior, queue gates, and scheduler registration state are unchanged. Future `B:\sdk` measurement command: `.\Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1 -PublishMode pr -MaxAutonomousTasks 1 -MaxPlanRevisions 1 -MaxCorrectionRounds 2 -Executor codex -CodexExecutorExternalScratch`. No measurement ran and no `B:\sdk` scratch target was created in ISSUE-340.

@@ -104,6 +104,8 @@ param(
 
 $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
 
+$script:PlanRevisionGateContextMaxChars = 20000
+
 # When $true, Fail throws instead of exiting so an eligible read-only model
 # review phase (Claude plan gate / Codex control) can be wrapped by a
 # same-phase retry. Reset to $false outside the retry wrapper so unrelated
@@ -609,6 +611,29 @@ function Get-CodexExecutorSandbox {
     return 'workspace-write'
 }
 
+function Limit-PlanRevisionGateContext {
+    # Plan-gate reviews are model prose and can become very large when the
+    # gate enumerates repository evidence. A revision prompt only needs the
+    # actionable review tail; keep the task goal untouched and cap this
+    # prior-gate context before feeding it back to Codex.
+    param(
+        [AllowNull()]
+        [string]$Text,
+        [ValidateRange(1000, 1000000)]
+        [int]$MaxChars = $script:PlanRevisionGateContextMaxChars
+    )
+
+    if (-not $Text) { return $Text }
+    if ($Text.Length -le $MaxChars) { return $Text }
+
+    $kept = $Text.Substring($Text.Length - $MaxChars, $MaxChars)
+    return @"
+[dispatch prior-gate context truncated: original $($Text.Length) chars; kept last $MaxChars chars. The omitted text was executor preflight review prose only.]
+
+$kept
+"@
+}
+
 function Invoke-CodexPreflightAudit {
     # Opt-in pitfall audit: run Codex in a read-only sandbox, extract a
     # marker-delimited Markdown body from the current audit output, validate
@@ -965,7 +990,7 @@ function Invoke-PlanFill {

     $gateContext = 'No prior executor gate.'
     if ($PriorExecutorGatePath -and (Test-Path -LiteralPath $PriorExecutorGatePath)) {
-        $gateContext = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $PriorExecutorGatePath
+        $gateContext = Limit-PlanRevisionGateContext -Text (Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $PriorExecutorGatePath)
     }
 
     $prompt = @"

This prevents verbose `needs_changes` gate output from making the next revision prompt exceed Codex's 1,048,576-character input ceiling.  > Snapshot: 2026-06-08 (ISSUE-342 command-palette fuzzy matching salvage): task 98 is implemented after the guarded/full-automation route failed in the Codex plan-gate revision path before execution. @@ -1806,3 +1806,5 @@ ew / partial / is_full_revolution / existing geometry tests. **Critical design c
 2026-06-08 (full-automation re-arm command-palette fuzzy matching). Added `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md` task 98 as the next selectable automation item after task 97 landed. The task is a bounded editor-usability follow-up: add deterministic fuzzy matching/scoring to the existing `editor-egui-host` command-palette filter while preserving exact/prefix/substring ranking and adding focused tests. Updated `Status.md` and `HANDOFF.md` to show automation is re-armed. **Explicit non-changes:** no plugin runtime/discovery, `editor-shell` routing, `editor-ui` menu registry, keybinding editor, Cargo manifests/lock, workflows, scheduler config, architecture lints, dispatch automation scripts, or renewed work on the already-fixed `egui::TopBottomPanel` warning.
 
 2026-06-08 (ISSUE-342 command-palette fuzzy matching manual salvage). Completed task 98 manually after the guarded/full-automation dispatch failed twice before execution: both attempts reached Codex plan-gate `needs_changes`, then the planner revision prompt exceeded the 1,048,576-character input limit. The salvage stayed on the preserved `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-342` worktree. `filter_command_palette_entries()` now supports deterministic ordered-subsequence fuzzy matching over menu-path label, shortcut display, and `Command::diagnostic_id()` while preserving exact word/field, prefix, and substring matches ahead of fuzzy-only matches. The private score key now combines worst match class, class sum, fuzzy gap/span compactness, matched field priority, label length, and original menu order. Focused `menu_tests.rs` coverage proves fuzzy label/shortcut/diagnostic-id matches, exact/prefix/substring outranking fuzzy-only results, stable compactness ordering across fuzzy matches, and no-match behavior. The cohesive host-menu test module now carries a file-local `// SPLIT-EXEMPTION:` annotation because the added palette coverage takes it past the 1000-line architecture-lint threshold. `plans/BASELINE.md`, `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, and `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md` record the shipped fuzzy behavior and preserve the remaining non-goals. **Explicit non-changes:** no `editor-shell` routing, `editor-ui` menu registry, plugin runtime/discovery, command history, second command model, host-shell FIFO replacement, keybinding editor, Cargo manifests/lock, workflows, scheduler config, architecture-lint rule/config behavior, dispatch automation behavior, dependencies, or unrelated files. **Verification:** focused `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib command_palette_filter` passed 6/6; `cargo test -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib` passed 50/50; `cargo check -p rge-editor-egui-host --lib` passed; `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` passed after applying standard formatting; `cargo run -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- all` passed after adding the file-local split exemption.
+
+2026-06-08 (plan-revision gate-context cap automation hygiene). Fixed the pre-execution automation failure pattern observed during ISSUE-342: after a plan gate returned `GATE_VERDICT: needs_changes`, `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1` injected the entire prior executor gate review into the next Codex planner prompt, allowing verbose gate prose to exceed Codex's 1,048,576-character input ceiling before execution. Added `Limit-PlanRevisionGateContext` with a 20,000-character cap and explicit truncation notice, and wired `Invoke-PlanFill` to use it only for prior gate-review context. The task goal, TASK packet, gate verdict semantics, same-phase retry behavior, execution, control review, queue publish modes, scheduler config, and sandbox routing are unchanged. `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md`, `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, and `AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md` record the behavior. **Verification:** focused `Invoke-PlanFill-Prompt.Tests.ps1` passed 11/11; full `tools/dispatch-tests` Pester suite passed 433/433; `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1` parser validation passed; `git diff --check` passed with CRLF warnings only.
